name: Eggson
description:
! This version of Toodles world works differently and if there's similar things to it, it was not intentional! I made this back in the bobette/christmas update. (The one during the start of 2025)¡

It's Easter!

The new toons for the season, Bassie, Flyte, and Cocoa, most of all, Eggson!

Swaps:

Flyte - Cocoa

Eggson - Bassie

Description for Eggson:

Eggson is a halved brown, boiled egg. The white and yolk of the egg are visible, he wears a fluffy, large collar around his neck, a yellow bowtie on top of it, as a cape that is colored orange and yellow drapes behind it. His shirt is longer (goes down to his thighs) and has Orange and Yellow stripes on it, his sleeves are white and have yellow on the cuffs. He also wields an orange cane, which has a yellow stripe on it. He doesnt carry it often. He has orange and yellow small glasses.
creator: Alessa_cutz
